topic: Feynman Lectures on Physics Volume I Part I (Chapters 1-12): Mechanics Foundations. Topics include: atoms in motion (kinetic theory), basic physics concepts, relation of physics to other sciences, conservation of energy, time and distance measurement, probability theory in physics, Newton's theory of gravitation, kinematics and motion, Newton's laws of dynamics, conservation of momentum, vector mathematics and analysis, characteristics of force. Deep research into the physical principles, historical context (1963 Caltech course), Feynman's pedagogical innovations, and key mathematical derivations.
